utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs; plan provides separate physical (€100/month) and mental (€65/month) plus total monthly cost—meets requirement. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs; plan lists InsurePlus Standard Coverage, describes contents/electronics coverage and states €60/month—meets requirement. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs; plan lists InsurePlus Standard Plan with features and €50/month—meets requirement. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs; plan lists multiple services and explicitly states cost included in base coverage (no additional fees)—meets requirement. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; plan provides monthly (€275), annual (€3,300), prior vs savings, and a cost breakdown—meets requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property/home contents, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel insurance. These names match exactly with entries in the ground-truth ratings. I mapped each selected item to its corresponding rating number from the ground-truth.
